profile.passwordTooShortDesc: Password must be at least 8 characters

dashboard.previewTooltipNoPath: Set the project folder path in Settings
dashboard.previewTooltipDev: Starts npm run dev or Streamlit in the background
dashboard.previewTooltipDevShort: Starts the dev server (npm run dev)
dashboard.serviceErrorDesc: Something went wrong. Try reloading or pick another service.
dashboard.customPromptPlaceholder: e.g. "Correlate X and Y"; "Analyze customer churn"; "Churn projections for next month"
dashboard.chatEmpty: Session history will appear here. Send a prompt to create your first chart.
dashboard.statusGuidance: More details needed for autonomous creation.
dashboard.chatPlaceholder: e.g. sales by region, monthly churn, revenue trend...
dashboard.pathRequiredDesc: Set the project folder path in Settings before testing the preview.
dashboard.previewStartedDefault: Dev server started. The preview will be available shortly.
dashboard.backendConnectFail: Could not connect to the backend.
dashboard.checkoutCancelDesc: You can try again whenever you want.
dashboard.insightsV1SyncFail: Could not sync; using demo data.
dashboard.noChartsToRefreshDesc: Create at least one chart via chat to refresh with backend data.
dashboard.ambiguousCatalog: Refine the question or pick a catalog suggestion.
dashboard.ambiguousSuggestions: Refine the question or choose one of the suggestions below.
dashboard.partialLowConfidence: Low confidence; data may be approximate.
dashboard.partialRefine: Low confidence; refine the prompt if you need accuracy.
dashboard.backendInsightFail: Could not generate insight on the backend
dashboard.backendInsightFallback: Using a local fallback chart so the flow continues.
dashboard.detailsNeededTitle: Details needed to create the chart
dashboard.detailsNeededDesc: Provide service, type, and goal for autonomous generation.
dashboard.serviceHintAll: All (or pick Pulso CSA, Cloud IaC, FinOps, Data & AI)
dashboard.guidanceChartType: 2) Chart type: area, bars, line, pie, or progress
dashboard.guidanceGoal: 3) Chart goal: e.g. compare cost by cloud, monitor churn, revenue trend
dashboard.connectionCreatedDesc: The two charts are linked for analysis.
dashboard.connectionSummaryDefault: Correlation analysis between the two charts.
dashboard.assistantOutcome: Selected service: {{service}}. Chart type: {{chart}}. Interpreted goal: {{prompt}}. Result: {{result}}.

pulsoCsa.subtitle: Project blueprint and structure · Alt+P
pulsoCsa.dragEnvHint: Drop a .env file here or use the button above
pulsoCsa.emptyStateTitle: Describe the project you want to generate
pulsoCsa.emptyStateHint: e.g. Generate folder blueprint and endpoints for an order management system
pulsoCsa.noLocalEngineDesc: With a project folder set, the local engine (Python + CSA code in pulso-csa-api/) must run on this machine. That code ships with the PulsoFrontend repo; install Python deps (pip) and use npm run electron:dev. Without the engine, the cloud API writes on the server, not your folder.
pulsoCsa.diagnosticsOnlyElectron: This panel only appears in the Electron app. In the browser, requests go to the cloud API and files are not written to the folder you type.
pulsoCsa.diagnosticsUnavailable: Diagnostics unavailable (update the app or Electron preload).
pulsoCsa.diagnosticsEngineOff: stopped or unhealthy — files will not be written here
pulsoCsa.diagnosticsPackagedNote: Installed build (Program Files): the microservice is bundled under resources; to use a different copy on disk, set it via the file below or PULSO_API_ROOT on the shortcut.
pulsoCsa.diagnosticsManualFileHint: Alternative: create {{path}} with a single line — the absolute path to the CSA api tree (same layout as pulso-csa-api/, including app/pulso_csa_local). Restart Electron.
pulsoCsa.diagnosticsEnvUnset: PULSO_API_ROOT is not set on the Electron process.
pulsoCsa.diagnosticsFolderUnset: Set the project folder path above (blur the field or use the folder icon to register it).
pulsoCsa.diagnosticsFolderOk: The project path matches an allowlist entry (or is under one).
pulsoCsa.diagnosticsFolderBad: This path is not on the allowlist. Blur the path field or use the folder picker to register it.
pulsoCsa.diagnosticsDevRelax: Dev mode: allowlist relaxed (PULSO_LOCAL_RELAX_ROOT_ALLOWLIST). Packaged builds use strict checks.

diagnosticsError.PULSO_API_ROOT_MISSING: Missing pulso-csa-api/ in the project (should be committed in PulsoFrontend) or bundled copy in the installer. Pull the repo or reinstall. Optional: PULSO_API_ROOT / app-data path file.
diagnosticsError.HEALTH_TIMEOUT: Python started but /health did not respond. Check pip deps, API .env, and the [pulso-csa-local] console output.
diagnosticsError.NO_PORT: Could not bind a free TCP port on 127.0.0.1.

pulsoCsa.placeholderPrompt: e.g. Generate folder blueprint and endpoints for an order management system...
pulsoCsa.renameDesc: Enter a new name for this conversation.
pulsoCsa.emptyEnvDesc: Fill in the variable name and value
pulsoCsa.dupEnvDesc: A variable with this name already exists
pulsoCsa.notAuthDesc: Sign in to send a prompt

notFound.m5: Looks like you found a bug... or did you? 🐛
notFound.m6: This route is not on the map 🗺️
notFound.subtitle: You may have wandered into a parallel dimension. No worries—we can bring you back!

settings.runtimeSetupLinkDesc: Download Python, run pip, pull Ollama models, and store your OpenAI key — no manual file editing.

runtimeSetup.title: Local environment (CSA)
runtimeSetup.intro: Set up the on-machine engine: embedded Python (Windows), pip packages in pulso-csa-api/, Ollama models, and OpenAI settings. Keys and flags are stored in app data (not the repo).
runtimeSetup.onlyElectron: This page is only available in the desktop Electron app.
runtimeSetup.pythonDesc: Download embedded Python 3.11 (Windows only) and run pip install -r requirements.txt in pulso-csa-api/ at the PulsoFrontend repo root (what the local engine uses).
runtimeSetup.pythonManualOnly: On this OS, install Python 3.11+ manually and ensure pip is available.
runtimeSetup.ollamaDesc: Install Ollama from the official site, then pull the default backend models (several GB).
runtimeSetup.llmDesc: OpenAI key is optional if you only use Ollama. You can force Ollama (USE_OLLAMA) and set the Ollama server URL.
runtimeSetup.openAiHint: Leave blank and save without typing to keep the current key. Enter a new key to replace it. Clear the field and save to remove the key.
runtimeSetup.forceOllama: Force Ollama (ignore OpenAI when no request key)
runtimeSetup.logDesc: Output from pip and ollama pull.
runtimeSetup.toastPythonInstalled: Embedded Python and pip are ready.
runtimeSetup.toastLlmSaved: Settings saved. Restart the engine if it was already running.

errors.PULSO_API_ROOT_MISSING: Missing pulso-csa-api/ in the repo or installer bundle. Pull latest or reinstall.
errors.REQUIREMENTS_MISSING: requirements.txt is missing in the api folder.
errors.PYTHON_NOT_FOUND: Python not found. Download embedded Python or install Python on the system.
errors.OLLAMA_CLI_MISSING: Ollama is not on PATH. Install from ollama.com and open a new session.
